explanation: Curtain, Footlights, Backstage, and Auditorium are all physical components or areas within a theater structure. A Score is a musical composition, not a structural element of the venue.

category: Deities or personifications primarily associated with the Sun or Moon in classical mythology
explanation: Apollo and Sol are Greek and Roman deities/personifications of the Sun, respectively. Selene and Luna are Greek and Roman deities/personifications of the Moon, respectively. Ares is the Greek god of war, associated with the planet Mars, but not primarily with the Sun or Moon itself.
Sun (one), Won (one), Fore (four), and Eight (eight) are all words that are homophones for numbers. Two is itself a number, not a homophone for another number.
